name: Fore Seasons Golf Lounge
about: Fore Seasons Golf Lounge is an indoor golf facility equipped with Trackman simulators, offering a climate-controlled environment for year-round play. The venue features over 240 golf courses globally and utilizes PGA/LPGA-approved technology for real-time swing and ball tracking. It provides options for casual play, private lessons, and memberships that include 24/7 access, catering to golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 240 golf courses worldwide
Real-time swing and ball tracking for immediate adjustments
PGA professional lessons available for skill development

simulator_hardware.notes: PGA/LPGA-approved radar technology for precise shot tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs for use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and drink options, but a BYOB policy is not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes can be played in 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is suitable for families and beginners of all ages.
